test_title: Smoke > home page responds without a server error
notes: Basic reachability smoke; only partial overlap with the logout/back regression scenario.

test_title: Access Control (auth) > unauthenticated user is redirected from /dashboard to login
notes: Explicit direct-URL protection coverage for a protected dashboard route.

test_title: Access Control (auth) > unauthenticated user is redirected from /documents to login
notes: Direct URL protection for the documents area; partial auth and documents security coverage.

test_title: Access Control (auth) > unauthenticated user is redirected from /driver/documents to login
notes: Covers protected-route behavior for the driver documents surface.

test_title: Documents RBAC > driver role should NOT access the admin documents page
notes: Driver/admin route denial; explicit auth RBAC plus documents RBAC coverage.

test_title: Documents RBAC > office role should NOT access the driver portal documents page
notes: Office/driver-portal denial; partial office finance-route auth concern plus documents RBAC.

test_title: Documents RBAC > office role should NOT see private driver salary/medical documents
notes: Blocked until private document selector and seed data exist.

test_title: Documents RBAC > direct-ID document access should be blocked when not authorized
notes: Blocked until document detail route and known unauthorized document id exist.

test_title: Documents RBAC > tenant_a user should NOT access a tenant_b document
notes: Cross-tenant unauthorized access check; requires seeded tenant_b document id.
Basic auth entry-point and form-render coverage only; does not exercise full happy/sad-path validation.
